name: capacitor-network-metrics-sdk
description: Capacitor plugin for network metrics measurement (Android + iOS)
author: Kevin Dupas

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && rollup -c rollup.config.js
scripts.verify: npm run verify:ios && npm run verify:android
scripts.verify:ios: cd ios && pod install && xcodebuild -workspace Plugin.xcworkspace -scheme Plugin -destination generic/platform=iOS build | xcpretty && cd ..
scripts.verify:android: cd android && ./gradlew clean build test && cd ..
